title: [MTR] Stadler FLIRT 3 with ŁKA livery (PL)
description: Stadler FLIRT 3 with ŁKA livery retexture of the BR423 for MTR
body:
This resource pack contains a retextured DB BR423 train with Łódzka Kolej Aglomeracyjna's livery and sounds recorded by the creator szandorthe13th.

Łódzka Kolej Aglomeracyjna is a Polish rail carrier offering its services mainly within the Łódź agglomeration.
